name: Cognition Therapeutics Inc. Common Stock
summary: Cognition Therapeutics, Inc. is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing therapeutics targeting age-related degenerative diseases and disorders, particularly those affecting the brain, such as Alzheimer's disease. The company's business model revolves around discovering and developing small molecule therapeutics designed to improve synaptic function and slow cognitive decline. Cognition Therapeutics is headquartered in Purchase, New York.
